title: Cricket Control in University Heights, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional cricket control services in University Heights, Bronx. Effective cricket removal and prevention for homes and apartments. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: University Heights residents know that crickets can quickly become a nuisance, especially in the area's classic pre-war apartment buildings and homes near Bronx Community College. At Best Pest Control NYC, we provide comprehensive cricket control services designed to eliminate infestations and prevent future problems. Our University Heights cricket removal services are priced affordably between $350 and $550, depending on the size and severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving University Heights and the greater Bronx for years with eco-friendly, effective pest solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique pest challenges faced by University Heights properties, from garden apartments along Sedgwick Avenue to multi-family buildings near Hall of Fame Terrace, and we deliver fast, reliable cricket control with long-lasting results.
localContext: University Heights is home to beautiful tree-lined streets, historic buildings, and landmarks like the Hall of Fame for Great Americans, but these older structures can provide ideal hiding spots for crickets seeking warmth and moisture. The neighborhood's mix of residential homes, apartment complexes, and proximity to green spaces like Sedgwick Playground means cricket activity can be especially prevalent during warmer months and when temperatures drop in fall.

faqs.question: Why do I have crickets in my University Heights apartment?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to warmth, moisture, and food sources commonly found in University Heights homes and apartments. Older buildings with cracks in foundations, gaps around windows, or basement moisture issues provide easy entry points. They're especially common near ground-floor units and buildings close to green spaces.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in University Heights can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one week. Our technicians will assess your specific situation and provide a customized treatment plan with realistic timelines during the initial inspection.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. We take extra precautions in residential buildings and will provide you with specific safety instructions tailored to your University Heights home or apartment.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 cricket control service include?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control service includes a thorough inspection of your University Heights property, identification of entry points and harborage areas, targeted treatment using professional-grade products, exclusion recommendations, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on your property size, infestation severity, and whether additional treatments are required.
